name: Research Prioritization Quadrant Chart
input: Create a quadrant chart for research project prioritization. X-axis: Feasibility (low to high). Y-axis: Scientific Impact (low to high). Quadrant labels: top-right 'Priority Projects', top-left 'High Risk High Reward', bottom-right 'Quick Wins', bottom-left 'Deprioritize'. Plot these projects: CRISPR Gene Therapy [0.3, 0.9], Drug Repurposing Screen [0.8, 0.6], Biomarker Validation [0.7, 0.4], Novel Target Discovery [0.2, 0.8], Clinical Data Mining [0.9, 0.3], Protein Structure Prediction [0.5, 0.7], Patient Registry Analysis [0.8, 0.5], Rare Disease Genomics [0.2, 0.5].
qualityCriteria: All 4 quadrant labels present (Priority Projects, High Risk High Reward, Quick Wins, Deprioritize)
At least 6 of 8 data points plotted with labels
Project names preserved (CRISPR Gene Therapy, Drug Repurposing, etc.)
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Quadrant chart with labeled axes, 4 labeled quadrants, 8 data points positioned by coordinates.
